examples: "I don't know," Nibs said, awestruck, "but it looks so weary, and as it flies it moans, 'Poor Wendy.'"
I stood and gazed at him, awestruck that anyone could be so beautiful.
People were awestruck by the pictures the satellite sent back to earth.
These gibbons are not scared of people and will brachiate at full speed over your awestruck head.
When the King first began touring Bhutan, people were too awestruck to confront him about their needs.
